name: ultrainit
description: A shell-native tool that orchestrates multiple Claude Code subagents to deeply analyze any codebase and generate a complete Claude Code configuration (CLAUDE.md, skills, hooks, subagents, commands, MCP servers).
deployment: GitHub Releases (single-file bundled ultrainit.sh via curl-pipe-bash); Docker image ghcr.io/joelbarmettleruzh/ultrainit-test for test runner
